backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining wellness report data types (SectionId, SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, CompleteWellnessReport) with validation functions for answers and scores, plus storage and ID generation for wellness reports.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four admin authentication removal features across AdminLoginPage, AdminDashboardPage, ContactFooter, and App.tsx with high confidence mappings to test requirements REQ-1 through REQ-4.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing setup, component descriptions, styling configurations, assessment flow pages, and data structures for the ABL Pulse wellness application.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet with Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, and design tokens for shadcn/ui components including sidebar, charts, and form elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse application with meta tags for SEO, viewport configuration, and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with 12 routes (home, assessment sections 1-4, results, admin, docs, etc.) wrapped in AssessmentProvider for global state management and LoadingScreen for pending states.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core values cards with icons (Education, Structured Improvement, Sustainable Lifestyle, Accessible First Step), and integrated FounderProfile component.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying bilingual analysis results with conditional styling for problems (red) or suggestions (green), rendering items as comma-separated text or bulleted list based on card type.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section number (1-4), percentage completion (25% increments), and animated gradient progress indicator with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component for collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, contact details, medical history) with validation and local storage integration before starting the assessment.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: SVG-based circular progress gauge that displays assessment scores with color-coded gradients (red/amber/green) based on score category status.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component with brand information, quick links, WhatsApp consultation button, social media icons, and admin access link.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors with bilingual messaging and options to retry or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Profile card component displaying founder Dr. Suman Lal's image, credentials, and mission statement with decorative styling.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable component rendering five frequency options (Never to Daily) in English and Hindi for assessment questions.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated background effects, main heading, and CTAs for assessment and WhatsApp consultation.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty file for language selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty file for language toggle button functionality.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component with animated logo, progress bar, and bilingual loading text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation bar with logo, menu items (Home, Assessment, About, Contact), language toggle, and responsive mobile/desktop layouts.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty file for question card component.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty file for specialized question card component.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty file for assessment results display page.
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty file for modal allowing users to resume incomplete assessments.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty file for assessment section wrapper component.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a section score card with bilingual title, score out of 40, status badge (alert/needsWork/optimal), icon, and a color-coded progress bar.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: An expandable card component displaying a health tip with bilingual title and description, plus an accordion section explaining why the tip helps.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Defines application-wide constants including WhatsApp number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for sections and total.
Provides global state for assessment responses, current section, language preference, and logic for section completion and access control with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: Defines English questions for four sections (12 questions total) covering sleep, hydration, nutrition, exercise, and mental well-being.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Defines Hindi translations of the same 12 questions across four sections covering sleep, hydration, nutrition, exercise, and mental well-being.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (IDs 1–10) for Section 1 focusing on daily routines, sleep timing, sunlight, and sleep quality.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (IDs 11–20) for Section 2 focusing on diet, digestion, meal timing, and food habits.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (IDs 21–30) for Section 3 focusing on physical activity, walking, stretching, breathing exercises, and energy levels.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Defines the Question interface and exports section4Questions array containing 10 wellness assessment questions (IDs 31-40) about gratitude, positivity, family time, health mindset, nature connection, emotional stability, stress management, communication, and professional guidance, each with English and Hindi translations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook providing localStorage operations for BasicInfoFormData including save, retrieve, clear, and validation functions to check if all required fields (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, whatsapp) are complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for React, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with support for delegation identity and configurable idle/login options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that manages PDF report generation state and provides a downloadPDF function to generate wellness reports with user data, section scores, problems, and habit suggestions using toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching all wellness reports, getting reports by ID, saving reports, retrieving test data, and checking admin user status, all integrated with the useActor hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles using Tailwind CSS with custom OKLCH color variables for brand theming (primary, accent, background), imports Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts, and includes custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow) for premium UI effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page component displaying a welcome screen with navigation to home and a card listing upcoming features like user data viewer, report exports, user management, and system configuration.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment page component that displays the ABL PULSE logo, back-to-home navigation, and renders the BasicInfoForm component within a centered, responsive layout.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that composes the main landing page by rendering Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components in sequence.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page that provides a bilingual (English/Hindi) template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates to the development team. Includes structured sections with accordions, cards, and badges to guide users through the documentation process.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays personalized service recommendations (Health Webinars, 1-on-1 Coaching, Functional Readiness Program) based on user assessment scores. Shows user info card with total score and status, and provides action buttons for each service.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Main results page that displays comprehensive wellness assessment results including total score, section breakdowns, circular gauge visualization, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 covering Sleep & Hydration habits with bilingual questions, progress bar, navigation controls, and validation to ensure completion before proceeding to Section 2.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 covering Gut Cleanse & Metabolic health with access guards to ensure Section 1 is completed, bilingual questions, and navigation between sections.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 covering Movement & Circulation Flow with access guards requiring completion of previous sections, bilingual questions, and navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders the fourth and final assessment section with 10 questions, validates completion of all sections, and navigates to results page with a loading overlay animation when the user completes the assessment.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three pre-configured test profiles (healthy, moderate, serious) fetched from the backend, showing scores and analysis in a tabbed interface for testing and demonstration purposes.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays a user's wellness profile with basic info, total ABL score out of 160, and a grid of four section cards showing individual scores and status categories (alert/needs work/optimal).
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines TypeScript types for the assessment system including Language, BasicInfoFormData with medical history, and Question/Section interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Implements rule-based pattern analysis that identifies low-scoring question groups (0-3) and maps them to specific health problems and Ayurvedic habit suggestions in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a downloadable plain text wellness report containing total score, section breakdown, primary problems, and habit suggestions formatted with ASCII borders.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty utility file, likely intended for future results sharing functionality.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Calculates assessment scores from responses (4 sections of 10 questions each, max 40 per section, 160 total), categorizes scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges, and provides color/label utilities for UI display.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Processes backend test scores into frontend display format, generates question-level responses from section totals, runs pattern analysis, and adds medical-history-specific recommendations.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens WhatsApp consultation with a pre-filled message containing user name and ABL score, directing to a default consultation number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (using oklch), fonts (Playfair Display, Montserrat), border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for ABL Pulse admin dashboard, documenting completed features that removed Internet Identity authentication and enabled direct admin page access.
